title: Thanks
description:
Thanks

All works are based on relations. Collective practice with many collaborators has contributed to a body of work, dialogues and new processes in various ways. I am deeply grateful to all participants for this exchange and sharing of ideas.

My thanks go to (in alphabetic order):

Vanessa Adler, Robin Arthur, Kurd Alsleben, Frank Bauer, Jo Bayer, Manon Bellet, Thomas Bohne, Matthew Burbidge, Sonja Burbidge, Enrico Centonze, Elly Clarke, Vilma Dombernowsky, Thomas Draschan, Tatiana Echeverri Fernandez, Christian Eckart, Caroline Eggel, Anna Engberg-Pedersen, Olafur Eliasson, David Elliott, Eric Ellingsen, Antje Eske, Linda Franke, Yona Friedman, April Gertler, Annabelle von Girsewald, Lise Harlev, Jeppe Hein, Silke Hein, Mathilde ter Heijne, Catherine Christer Hennix, Sophie Hjerl, Caroline Hoegsbro, Jeroen Jacobs, Claudia Kapp, Mark Kiessling, Constanze Kleiner, Susanne Kohler, Cassandra Lasch Edlefsen, Julia Lazarus, Karin Lind, Søren Lose, Antonia Low, Jens Chr. Madsen, Annette Maechtel, Alina Mann, Matthias Mayer, Jason Merrill Benedict, Christl Mudrak, Stephan Müller, Fabian Mrongowius, Oliver Möst, Rainer Neumaier, Hester Oerlemans, Norbert Palz, Manfred Peckl, Paul Polaris, Emilio Rapaná, Rachel Rits-Volloch, Isabel de Sena, Mira Schnedler, Raaf van der Sman, Bettina Springer, Erik Steinbrecher, Efrat Stempler, Jaro Straub, Montse Torreda, Honoka Uchiito, Clemens Vogel, Christina Werner, Miya Yoshida, Eric Zapel, Alexis Zavialoff, Jens Ziehe, Susan Zieger, Ella Ziegler, Moira Z, plus my students during the past years.
